summary: Comprehensive testing of SurakshitPath (re-skinned Safe-Route Navigation System) completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows tested successfully with new Indian government portal aesthetic - tricolor strip, navy+saffron palette, bilingual Hindi/English branding, CartoDB Voyager light map tiles.
critical_code_review_comments: Gov-style UI implemented correctly with tricolor strip, Masthead with chakra emblem, SurakshitPath branding, Hindi text, and BGI Hackathon 2026 info
Auth mechanism changed from cookie-based to localStorage Bearer token - working correctly
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints properly handle authentication via Bearer token
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded from responses
Environment variables used correctly for configuration
Map tiles changed to CartoDB Voyager (light theme) - renders correctly
seed_data_creation: 15 incidents in Bangalore area (12 seeded + 3 test-created)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend flows are working correctly. Auth mechanism uses localStorage Bearer token (key: spath_session_token). Test session 'test_session_demo_001' is pre-seeded in DB with admin privileges. Twilio SMS is in SIMULATION mode (simulated=true in responses). LLM integrations (GPT-5.2 for risk analysis, Gemini 3 Flash for chat) are working via Emergent LLM key. New gov-style UI with tricolor strip, navy header, saffron accents, and bilingual Hindi/English text.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: SIMULATION mode - logs instead of sending real SMS. Response contains simulated=true

backend: GET /api/ - Health check with twilio_ready and llm_ready status
GET /api/auth/me - Returns demo user with is_admin=true (Bearer token auth)
POST /api/routes/safest - Returns scored routes with geometry, safety_score, level, nearby_incidents, lighting_score, crowd_density
POST /api/sos/trigger - Returns alert_id, contacts_notified, simulated=true, maps_url
POST /api/ai/risk-analysis - Returns non-empty analysis from GPT-5.2
POST /api/ai/chat - Returns reply from Gemini 3 Flash
GET /api/admin/incidents - Lists all incidents for admin

landing_page: Masthead with chakra emblem, SurakshitPath, Hindi text सुरक्षित पथ
map_app: Gov navy header with SurakshitPath branding
Route search bottom sheet with saffron tab
Admin nav link visible for admin user
route_planning: Find safest route returns scored routes
Get AI Insight returns GPT-5.2 analysis
sos_flow: Success message shows simulated=true and maps_url
ai_chat: Messages send and receive replies from Gemini 3 Flash
admin_dashboard: Stats cards (Total, Active, Resolved, Users, SOS)
Moderation table with filters (ALL, ACTIVE, RESOLVED, FLAGGED)

auth_mechanism_notes: Frontend stores session_token in localStorage under key 'spath_session_token' and sends Authorization: Bearer <token>. Backend reads cookie OR Bearer header (cookie first, then Authorization). For Playwright testing, use page.evaluate('localStorage.setItem("spath_session_token", "test_session_demo_001")') BEFORE navigating to /app.
